tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsAppConnectionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new AppConnection in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsAppConnectionsList
tools.description: Lists AppConnections in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsAppConnectionsResolve
tools.description: Resolves AppConnections details for a given AppConnector. An internal method called by a connector to find AppConnections to connect to.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsAppConnectorsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new AppConnector in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsAppConnectorsList
tools.description: Lists AppConnectors in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsAppConnectorsPatch
tools.description: Updates the parameters of a single AppConnector.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsAppConnectorsReportStatus
tools.description: Report status for a given connector.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsAppConnectorsResolveInstanceConfig
tools.description: Gets instance configuration for a given AppConnector. An internal method called by a AppConnector to get its container config.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsAppGatewaysCreate
tools.description: Creates a new AppGateway in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsAppGatewaysList
tools.description: Lists AppGateways in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsClientGatewaysGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsClientGatewaysSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsClientGatewaysTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsOperationsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a long-running operation. This method indicates that the client is no longer interested in the operation result. It does not cancel the operation. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsOperationsGet
tools.description: Gets the latest state of a long-running operation. Clients can use this method to poll the operation result at intervals as recommended by the API service.

tools.name: projects.beyondcorpProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
